results.title: CALIFORNIA - Grinduro
results.content:
### GRINDURITO

Not quite as challenging, but a healthy bite of the Grinduro experience - Grindurito for 2026 will be roughly one half of the challenge of Grinduro without the competition. At 23-miles and 3,000 feet of climbing, Grindurito is a solid alternative if your legs aren’t quite ready for the full course, or for a first time racer. Grindurito racers test their mettle with two timed segments, a punchy hill climb and a fast and flowy singletrack descent- all for bragging rights.

## FORMAT

Grinduro California gravel race

## LOCATION

Quincy, California, is located in the northwestern Sierra Mountains. It began as a Gold Rush community in 1858, but now it is made famous as the best spot for a California gravel race! [...] Quincy trails, Grinduro California gravel race

## FORMAT

In short, Grinduro is just what the name suggests: Gravel Road Race + Mountain Bike-Style Enduro = one long loop of pavement and dirt, where finishing times aren’t based on overall loop time, but four timed segments (each roughly five-to-ten minutes). But Grinduro is not just a bike race. It’s a celebration of cycling with as much emphasis on the fun as the ride, with excellent food, an impressive display of art and incredible handmade bikes, live music, camping and a festival atmosphere. [...] Once a rider is dropped from the main peloton they must ride as far right as possible in single formation. This applies to both the pavement and dirt sections.

results.title: Grinduro: The Ultimate Gravel Bike Race Experience - Grinduro

Grinduro logo

# The Perfect Party-to-Race Ratio!

What is GRINDURO?! At its heart, the unique format of GRINDURO combines the best elements of a mountain bike enduro with a gravel grinder-style road race. But GRINDURO is not just another gravel race. It’s a celebration of gravel cycling with as much emphasis on the fun as the ride. The magic happens when you add great food, an art & bike festival, high-quality music and camping in an epic location.

It’s a winning formula with a global following, making the word GRINDURO! a rallying cry for a burgeoning category of adventure and gravel cycling.

With a bunch of cool locations around the world, what is holding you back from signing up to GRINDURO in 2026?! [...] Subscribe to our newsletter!

## GLOBAL SPONSORS

results.title: Grinduro Race Information
results.content:
Sierra Buttes Trail Stewardship Downieville Classic Lost and Found

Mountains to Meadows Endurofest in Quincy,CA

##

# GRINDURO! Race Information

### The ultimate social gravel race with the perfect party-to-race ratio. Maxin’ and Relaxin’.

GRINDURO! California is September 12th, 2026

Parts of the 2026 Grinduro route will feel familiar to those who raced in 2025, but this year’s course will also serve up a brand-new challenge. We’re running it back with the big climb to Argentine and Grizzly Ridge and adding some newly built, flowy SBTS singletrack into the untimed portion. Three new timed stages accompany the classic finishing Smokechaser stage on the Mt. Hough Trail singletrack descent. The timed stages will lean slightly more gravel-oriented than the 2025 stages. [...] Stage 4, Smokechaser 5.6 miles, 2,202 feet of descent, 102 feet of ascent. 3:45PM CUTOFF.  
 The classic stage. Flowy Mt. Hough singletrack, a throwback to the original Grinduro

Lachlan Morton and Grinduro racer  
 Lachlan Morton relaxin' on a transfer stage at the 2025 Quincy Grinduro. Photo: Billy Sinkford

### The Grindurito

Not up for the full Grinduro? Then Grindurito is for you! A fun, 23.3-mile ride with 3,011 feet of climbing, Grindurito still has two of the four timed stages: Huff-n-Puff & Smokechaser. Podiums for top male and female, and juniors.  
 Grindurito Course Map

Grinduro gravel bike racers

Grinduro gravel bike racers on a timed downhill

Grinduro gravel bike racers riding through a mountain valley

### Grinduro Start Time

8AM - non-compeitive rollout to stage 1. [...] Race Results Posted Here

#### Check out the 2025 Grinduro race and festival vibe coverage at The Radavist

### Race Maps

Full GRINDURO! Ride Map

Stage 1, Huff-n-Puff  
 1.6 miles, 739 feet of gain. 9AM CUTOFF. A gut punch of a climb. But hey, the High Sierra views ease the pain!

Stage 2, Grizzly’s Grinder 3.5 miles, 309 feet of gain, 304 feet of descent. 1:30PM CUTOFF.  
 This one will be pedalllllllyyyyyy… in a good way. You may outspin your gears on the descent as the grade is very minimal. Equipment choice will come into play here, and speeds will be high!

Stage 3, King Solomon’s Fall 2.4 miles, 803 feet of descent. 2:15PM CUTOFF.  
 A consistently ripping descent on King Solomon Road. All dirt, no hurt (hopefully).

results.title: PENNSYLVANIA
results.content:
With camping available at the venue and plenty of lodging in town, participants are encouraged to come on Friday and leave later on Sunday to hang with friends while “pre-gaming” and recovering together. We’re sure some social rides will also happen organically.

## EVENT SCHEDULE

Camping

## LODGING & CAMPING

Camping will be available at the venue: Castanea Fire Company Picnic Grounds for just $10 per person. For camping in the woods there’s Hyner State Park that's just a half-hour drive away and is a delightful way to spend the night outdoors. But Grinduro is also based in the honest-to-goodness city of Lock Haven with hotels, AirBnBs, Bed & Breakfasts, and more for your nights’ sleep. Visit Explore Clinton County to find all sorts of fun ways to stay the weekend! [...] + You may cancel your entry and receive a credit valued at 40% of your entry fee to use toward another Grinduro or unPAved Pennsylvania event within 1 year of cancellation. You MUST cancel no less than 10 days prior to the scheduled event.
 Cancellations after July 8, 2026 and no-shows do not qualify for a credit. [...] COURSES hosted by komoot:

 Grinduro: 79 miles, 6,500’ climbing, 66% unpaved
 Grindurito: 42 miles, 3,500’ climbing, 64% unpaved

## COURSE

Grinduro Scotland race plate

## FORMAT

Grinduro is a bike race ridden at a social pace. Riders take on the 79-mile all-terrain loop that can include anything from rocky singletrack, to gravel fire roads, and pavement sections. 

Four timed segments on the route add a competitive element with overall timings based on these segments alone so you’re free to ride between stages at a conversational pace and spend quality time at the Aid Stations.
